key_result: M4 fixed_31 precision 0.669, recall 0.475, F1 0.556; observed ge31 rows were compressed below score 31 and station bias was visible, especially S142.
supports_decision: Established that deterministic WBGT_A remains useful but under-captures high-tail events at the nominal fixed threshold.
caveat: Retrospective OOF diagnostic only; weather columns were absent in this first decomposition.
safe_claim: System A has retrospective WBGT_A temporal severity evidence with high-tail compression diagnostics.
forbidden_claim: Do not claim validated local WBGT prediction, official warning probability, or prospective forecast skill.

key_result: Weather merge retained 2700 of 6696 rows (40.3%); regime interaction was plausible_but_partial, with very-high radiation bins concentrating many ge31 misses.
supports_decision: Motivated full-period weather-regime recovery before stronger regime claims.
caveat: Partial-period matched rows only; precipitation missing; superseded for coverage by A-L1H.0c.
safe_claim: Partial retrospective regime evidence suggested radiation-linked high-tail miss structure.
forbidden_claim: Do not use A-L1H.0b alone as full-period regime proof or causal mechanism proof.

key_result: Recovered 6696 of 6696 rows (100.0%) across 27 stations; radiation_hot contained nearly all observed ge31 events and misses, while conditional enrichment remained mixed.
supports_decision: Confirmed full-period retrospective regime context for high-tail misses without changing the model.
caveat: Regime diagnostics are not causal proof and are not operational warning probabilities.
safe_claim: Full-period weather-regime residual diagnostics support internal high-tail evidence review.
forbidden_claim: Do not claim weather regimes validate local WBGT, explain causality, or complete risk mapping.

key_result: Raw Stull/simple-globe formula and proxy candidates did not produce fixed_31 crossings; best raw proxies stayed below 31 C and had worse high-tail residual behavior.
supports_decision: Kept formula-v2 out of the current contract and directed attention to score-to-event probability calibration.
caveat: Advanced WBGT physics packages were unavailable or not validated; no Liljegren-style formula was faked.
safe_claim: Formula/proxy audit did not justify replacing current WBGT_A score in Level 1.
forbidden_claim: Do not claim formula-v2 is implemented, validated, or retroactively recalibrates System A.

key_result: Best companion is M4_inertia_ridge + isotonic_score_only under station_grouped_loso: Brier about 0.052, PR-AUC about 0.610, threshold about 0.309, precision 0.678, recall 0.765, F1 0.719, CSI 0.561.
supports_decision: Accept P_ge31 as a retrospective diagnostic companion while keeping WBGT_A score primary.
caveat: Station-held-out retrospective OOF calibration only; not official warning probability and not prospective forecast skill.
safe_claim: P_ge31 is a candidate diagnostic companion for internal retrospective ge31 review.
forbidden_claim: Do not claim P_ge31 is an official warning probability, policy threshold, or prospective operational model.
